Examples

Sample Snippet

RasterHistogram

The raster histogram.

virtual IRasterHistogram RasterHistogram { get; }

Returns

IRasterHistogram

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>An object used to manage the histogram of the raster pixels. It can be retrieved from a <STRONG>RasterBand</STRONG>.</P>

RasterStatistics

The raster statistics.

virtual IRasterStatistics RasterStatistics { get; }

Returns

IRasterStatistics

Examples

Sample Snippet

Remarks

<P>A <STRONG>RasterStatistics</STRONG> object provides access to statistics from a raster band.</P> <P>The <STRONG>RasterStatistics</STRONG> can be retrieved from a <STRONG>RasterBand</STRONG> using IRasterBand interface.</P>

Save(IStream, int) 

virtual void Save(IStream pstm, int fClearDirty)

Parameters

pstm IStream
fClearDirty int

The standard deviation value of the historgram.

virtual double StdDev { get; set; }

Returns

double
